name: Country Club Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped eggs, celery, parsley, pimientos, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Gently stir in the mayonnaise until well blended.
3. Spread 1/3 of the egg salad mixture on 4 slices of toast.
4. Top each slice with another slice of toast, then add two slices of tomato, two strips of bacon, and one lettuce leaf.
5. Cut into four triangles.
